headlines.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as North American consumers tighten their budgets
headlines.summary: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

headlines.title: From 'dear Donald' to 'Trump trillion': Inside NATO chief Mark Rutte's U.S. strategy
headlines.summary: NATO chief Mark Rutte lavished praise on U.S. President Donald Trump during a fractious summit in Turkey this week.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
headlines.summary: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

headlines.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
headlines.summary: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.

headlines.title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
headlines.summary: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family.”

headlines.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
headlines.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”

headlines.title: Major drugmaker loses $27 billion in market value after failed trial
headlines.summary: Two companies  announced on Thursday that the heart disease drug they had been developing failed its Phase III trial.

headlines.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq listing may become the second-largest equity offering ever, trailing only SpaceX’s
headlines.summary: Friday’s offering of SK Hynix may become the second-largest equity offering ever.

headlines.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
headlines.summary: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

economy.summary: Fed Funds Rate 3.63，近 3 期趨勢 持平；美國 10 年期公債殖利率 4.569，近 3 期趨勢 連續上升；VIX 16.88，近 3 期趨勢 最近一期下降。整體總經風險分級：medium。

strategies.price_above_ma200: 收盤價高於 200 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.ma20_cross_ma60: 20 日均線高於 60 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.buy_and_hold: 買入持有基準，用於比較策略是否優於單純持有。

assumptions.transaction_cost_note: 每次部位變化扣除 0.1% 交易成本，用於保守估計。
assumptions.lookahead_bias_control: 策略使用前一交易日訊號承擔下一交易日報酬，避免偷看未來資料。

signals.disclaimer: 研究訊號僅供分析，不是買賣建議。

symbols.observation_note: 正負條件尚未形成明確方向，維持一般追蹤。
